title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.457 - Penalty for failure to report death (certain counties)
text:
58.457.  Penalty for failure to report death (certain counties). — Any person failing to supply the information required by section 58.451 is guilty of a misdemeanor and is punishable by a fine of not more than one thousand dollars, or by imprisonment in the county jail for not more than sixty days, or by both the fine and imprisonment.
(L. 1957 p. 334 § 3, A.L. 1959 H.B. 396)
